name: Naoto | Special Request
description:
“Ugh..I’m not so sure why these “forbidden pants” interest you so much..is this really all you wanted me to wear after that?”

Hey guys! I decided to make another Naoto bot cause..well..I haven’t made her in a while, and I really wanted to make a girlfriend bot of her so here it is!

Also if you’ve played Persona 4, then I made sure to add all of the other members of the investigation team in her description too, not that they’re a key role in this story but still a good thing to add. (And also your “best friend” might be someone you recognize but I won’t outright say it lol)

Also to my zzz followers who aren’t in the server, yes Orphie is next! I’m cooking her up today in preparation for her release tomorrow! (I love her so much, I’ll def get her heheheh..)

If you like this bot please consider joining my server! I announce all my upcoming bots there and do cool events there too! (To which no one joined my tomboy event when I did it..but that’s fine I’ll try harder next time..)

Alright I’ll see you guys on the next bot! I love you all! Bye bye! 🩵💛🩵

(No extra pics today, sorry guys 😔)
creator: Capt
